decisions.name: security
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): src 변경 + pg_advisory_xact_lock 트랜잭션 TOCTOU 방어 검증

decisions.name: performance
decisions.reason: V105 인덱스 추가로 성능 개선(hot-path 최적화) — database reviewer 가 검증

decisions.name: architecture
decisions.reason: admission gate TOCTOU 방어의 advisory lock 원자성 설계 + transaction scope 변경

decisions.name: requirement
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): recordRunningSegmentStart 누락 CRITICAL fix 검증 — §8 active-running 타임아웃 복구

decisions.name: scope
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): fix scope 검증 — 의도 대비 범위 적절성(advisory lock scope, admitted branch 범위)

decisions.name: side_effect
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): pg_advisory_xact_lock 트랜잭션 격리·deadlock 위험 + recordRunningSegmentStart 호출 영향 검증

decisions.name: maintainability
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): advisory lock 락키 계산(hashtext) + tx 구조 복잡도 + 주석 품질 검증

decisions.name: testing
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): mock 갱신(manager.transaction advisory lock 모의) + admitted 케이스 segmentStartMs 검증 추가 여부

decisions.name: documentation
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): spec §8 flip 확인("enforcement 완료" 로 정정되었는지), advisory lock 필수성 재서술

decisions.name: dependency
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): docker-compose env 변경 상태 확인

decisions.name: database
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): V105 인덱스 추가(workflow_id, status) + advisory lock 트랜잭션 격리 영향 검증

decisions.name: concurrency
decisions.reason: 핵심 검증: pg_advisory_xact_lock 트랜잭션으로 TOCTOU race 실제 폐쇄되었는지 + workspace-scope 락 범위 적절성 + deadlock 위험

decisions.name: api_contract
decisions.reason: GET /api/workspaces/:id/settings 응답에 maxConcurrentExecutions 추가 확인 + WorkspaceSettingsDto 동기화

decisions.name: user_guide_sync
decisions.reason: 매트릭스 trigger 미매칭 — admission gate 내부 메커니즘(사용자 UI 변경 없음), GET settings 추가는 API-only
